## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Airtable workflow for content creation and review process between Mindr and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airtable setup with 9 stages for content workflow, from topic ideation to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Process refinements needed for legal review integration and keyword/topic management](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Potential project to automate state-level content updates using web scraping and AI](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

## Topics

### Airtable Workflow Overview

  - [9 stages in content creation process: Considering, Topics Shortlisted, Topics Approved/Rejected, Content Completed, Content Rework, Content Approved, Legal Review, Legal Approved, Published](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Prateek to add one-sentence definitions for each stage to clarify next steps](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Team to determine best process for legal review integration (email vs. platform access)](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Jessica to review metadata (title, description, slug) at "Content Completed" stage](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Brian suggested reviewing a sample of articles to calibrate AI output with team expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Team to be cautious of potential duplicate content with other agency's work (e.g., Napier)](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Keyword and Topic Management

  - [Shifted from "keywords" to "topics" for clearer communication](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Primary keyword typically used as topic name, included in H1 and meta title](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Secondary keywords naturally incorporated through AI content generation](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Jessica to review first 3 articles to compare keyword alignment with team expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

### State-Level Content Automation Project

  - [Discussed potential project to automate state-level content updates using web scraping and AI](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Challenges include defining fields, data mapping across sources, and setting up alert system for content changes](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Prateek estimates 4-month timeline based on previous similar project](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Team to further discuss scope and feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to add one-sentence definitions for each Airtable stage](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Jessica to review topics without comments and provide feedback via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Team to consult with Amanda about sitemap of content pages being created by other agency](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Prateek to discuss state-level content automation project with Daniel and provide update next week](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Team to determine process for legal review integration](https://fathom.video/share/Wq4hpDTUkSh932pgBU6wuStLpGyg4iLm?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
